# init(value:)

**Initializer**

Creates a property state with a value.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(value: ObjectType?)
```

## Parameters

- **value**: The value to associate with the property state.

## Discussion

The system supports the following value types: [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSDictionary], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSArray], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSString], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSData], and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSNumber].

## Creating a Property State

- **init(value:attributes:)**: Creates a property state with a value and attributes.
